'''竏嗚-zh-r-d''' ('''kajazhredoko''') is an [[Aelaki]] [[Verbs|transitive verb]] meaning "[[Wikt:euthanise|euthanise]] (auto-generated)".

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| j-zh-r-d
|-
! Word class
| [[Transitive verb]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:euthanise|euthanise]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Citation form
| 竏嗚-zh-r-d
|-
! Lemma
| kajazhredoko
|}

== Agreement paradigm ==
=== [[Agent]] agreement ===
''[[Patient]] fixed at fourth female singular, telic perfect template.''
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[child]].[[collective]] || [[word:thijazhredoko|thijazhredoko]] || [[word:jijazhredoko|jijazhredoko]] || [[word:shijazhredoko|shijazhredoko]] || [[word:kijazhredoko|kijazhredoko]]
|-
| [[child]].[[plural]] || [[word:thuthujazhredoko|thuthujazhredoko]] || [[word:jujujazhredoko|jujujazhredoko]] || [[word:shushujazhredoko|shushujazhredoko]] || [[word:kukujazhredoko|kukujazhredoko]]
|-

|-

|-

|-

|-

|-
| [[female]].[[zero]] || [[word:thojazhredoko|thojazhredoko]] || [[word:jojazhredoko|jojazhredoko]] || [[word:shojazhredoko|shojazhredoko]] || [[word:kojazhredoko|kojazhredoko]]
|-
| [[male]].[[collective]] || [[word:thﾃｦjazhredoko|thﾃｦjazhredoko]] || [[word:jﾃｦjazhredoko|jﾃｦjazhredoko]] || [[word:shﾃｦjazhredoko|shﾃｦjazhredoko]] || [[word:kﾃｦjazhredoko|kﾃｦjazhredoko]]
|-
| [[male]].[[plural]] || [[word:thathajazhredoko|thathajazhredoko]] || [[word:jajajazhredoko|jajajazhredoko]] || [[word:shashajazhredoko|shashajazhredoko]] || [[word:kakajazhredoko|kakajazhredoko]]
|-
| [[male]].[[singular]] || [[word:thajazhredoko|thajazhredoko]] || [[word:jajazhredoko|jajazhredoko]] || [[word:shajazhredoko|shajazhredoko]] || [[word:kajazhredoko|kajazhredoko]]
|-

|}
=== [[Patient]] agreement ===
''[[Agent]] fixed at third male singular, telic perfect template.''
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
